text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I approach the training grounds one day to find
Nakayama Festa and Tosen Jordan training
together.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Phew, thanks queen! That helped tons! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Don't mention it.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Running "to the max" every once in a while does
scratch an itch.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait, so you're saying you were actually
enjoying yourself too? Then that's cool by me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anywho, I'll totes be paying you back for this
later, so look forward to that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: What? You really gotta shout?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I was watching the two of you just now!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That was beyond the realm of normal training!
The way your fists were clenched, sweat flying
every which way. I felt like I was watching a
proper race with those moves! That was totally...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The wildest! Strongest! Hypest training session
EVER! My heart's on fiiire!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Could ya run like that with me? No, could you
push yourself even further against me?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Got a big race coming up, eh? Makes sense you'd
wanna run with someone who's always all-in.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yep! All in the name of becoming the world's
strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna be the strongest racer in the world,
then I gotta crush all those champs overseas!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But winning overseas is tough, and there's not
many opportunities to enter the ring!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So I've got to keep pushing! I've got to improve
myself even more!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Takin' every chance you get, huh? I like that
attitude.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Right-handed, 2,400 meters. Sound good?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa and El Condor Pasa begin a
heated partner-running session, but soon...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, no. Enough.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? Is something wrong, Nakayama?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this isn't any good. I'm not feeling it at all.
Listen, El...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: You takin' your running seriously?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: O-of course! I'm giving it everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm seriously putting in everything to get stronger!
From racing with powerful rivals to rethinking my
own approaches—every day's a training fiesta!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And it's all in the name of racing overseas!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but that's not doing it for me. You'll have
to find someone else to train with.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
P-please don't go! What does Jordan have that I
don't?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Running with her gets my blood pumping, that's
all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: What... I don't get what that means at all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Can't you come down to my level a bit and tell me? Te lo pido por favor!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Dunno. The love of the game wasn't there. See
you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Just what am I lacking to you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's distressed pleas echo across the
track.
